query: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.type, a.fixedPrice, a.maxQuantity, sa.subcategoryId, s.name as subcatName FROM addons a LEFT JOIN subcategory_addons sa ON a.id = sa.addonId LEFT JOIN subcategories s ON sa.subcategoryId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%Ice Cream%' OR a.name IN ('Strawberry', 'Blueberry', 'Mango', 'Chocolate', 'Vanilla') ORDER BY a.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, a.type, a.fixedPrice, a.maxQuantity, sa.subcategoryId, s.name as subcatName FROM addons a LEFT JOIN subcategory_addons sa ON a.id = sa.addonId LEFT JOIN subcategories s ON sa.subcategoryId = s.id WHERE s.name LIKE '%Ice Cream%' OR a.name IN ('Strawberry', 'Blueberry', 'Mango', 'Chocolate', 'Vanilla') ORDER BY a.id;
